# Pacta Protocol

> The trust layer for AI that does real business. Pacta Protocol lets AI agents hire real, licensed, collateral-backed businesses under contracts that enforce themselves - payment held in escrow, work proven against official public registries, and disputes settled by a neutral arbiter.

Pacta Protocol is MCP-first: it ships a Model Context Protocol server with 12 tools covering the full lifecycle (discover, contract, fund escrow, verify, settle, rate), so any MCP-capable agent can transact end to end without prompt tuning or a custom SDK. It is a working proof of concept - the demo firms and money are fictional, but the mechanics (double-entry ledger, escrow, staking, slashing, registry verification, the MCP server) are fully implemented and tested.

How trust is manufactured:
- Stake: providers post real collateral to become "vetted"; the badge holds only while the stake is above zero, and open work is capped relative to stake and proven track record.
- Escrow: the buyer's money moves into a per-engagement escrow account on a double-entry, integer-cents ledger; neither side can touch it until work is verified.
- Registry proof: fulfillment steps reference official public registries; the buying agent re-verifies each proof before releasing payment.
- Slashing: losing a dispute slashes the provider's stake (20% on a full refund, 10% on a split); a stake drained to $0 loses vetted status automatically.

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://pactaprotocol.org/): what Pacta Protocol is, for agents and for businesses.
- [Getting started](https://pactaprotocol.org/docs/index.html): run it locally in two commands; the three roles; the lifecycle; the trust model.
- [MCP integration](https://pactaprotocol.org/docs/mcp.html): the 12 Model Context Protocol tools, config, and a full purchase session.
- [FAQ](https://pactaprotocol.org/docs/faq.html): escrow, vetting, slashing, disputes, and autonomous agent use.
- [Privacy Policy](https://pactaprotocol.org/privacy.html): no accounts, no analytics, only a language preference in localStorage.

## Details
- App: https://app.pactaprotocol.org/
- Source: https://github.com/Pacta-Protocol
- Contact: hello@pactaprotocol.org
- Languages: English and Spanish.
- License: open source under the MIT License.
